lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਿਵ ਵਰਤਾਈਅਨੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਠਾਰੁ ਗੜਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aape siv varataaeean antar aape seetal tthaar garraa |13|
lines.english: You Yourself spread peace within; You are cool and icy calm. ||13||
You Yourself are the hero, exerting Your regal power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਠਕੁਰਾਈ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: tis hee sukh tis hee tthakuraaee tiseh na aavai jam nerraa |14|
lines.english: He is peaceful, and he is the master of all; the Messenger of Death does not even approach him. ||14||
One whom You bless and make Gurmukh
the Naam abides within him, and the unstruck sound current vibrates for him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ਹਾਥਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਕੈ ਨੇਬੇੜਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aad madh ant prabh soee haath tisai kai neberraa |15|
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle and in the end, God exists. Judgement is in His Hands alone. ||15||
His value cannot be described on paper.
Says Nanak, the Lord of the world is infinite.
No one is equal to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਬੁਤੈ ਜਬਾਬੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kis hee butai jabaab na hoee |
lines.english: No one can stand up against Him by any means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਚੋਜ ਖੜਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak kaa prabh aape aape kar kar vekhai choj kharraa |16|1|10|
lines.english: Nanak's God is Himself all-in-all. He creates and stages and watches His wondrous plays. ||16||1||10||
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਖੀਕੇਸ ਗੋਵਰਧਨ ਧਾਰੀ ਮੁਰਲੀ ਮਨੋਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rikheekes govaradhan dhaaree muralee manohar har rangaa |1|
lines.english: The Supreme Rishi, the Master of the sensory organs, the uplifter of mountains, the joyful Lord playing His enticing flute. ||1||
He is the Slayer of demons, our Supreme Lord and Master.
The Supreme Lord God is imperishable, the Transcendent Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.
The Enticer of Hearts, the Lord of wealth, Krishna, the Enemy of ego.
The Lord of the Universe, the Dear Lord, the Destroyer of demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਘਟ ਘਟ ਵਾਸੀ ਹੈ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan abinaasee tthaakur ghatt ghatt vaasee hai sangaa |2|
lines.english: The Life of the World, our eternal and ever-stable Lord and Master dwells within each and every heart, and is always with us. ||2||
The Support of the Earth, the man-lion, the Supreme Lord God.
The Protector who tears apart demons with His teeth, the Upholder of the earth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਵਨ ਰੂਪੁ ਕੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਸੇਤੀ ਹੈ ਚੰਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: baavan roop keea tudh karate sabh hee setee hai changaa |3|
lines.english: O Creator, You assumed the form of the pygmy to humble the demons; You are the Lord God of all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਾਮਚੰਦ ਜਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sree raamachand jis roop na rekhiaa |
lines.english: You are the Great Raam Chand, who has no form or feature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਹੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭ ਹੈ ਮੰਗਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sehas netr moorat hai sahasaa ik daataa sabh hai mangaa |4|
lines.english: You have thousands of eyes, and thousands of forms. You alone are the Giver, and all are beggars of You. ||4||
Adorned with flowers, holding the chakra in Your hand, Your form is incomparably beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਸੁਦੇਵ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦਾਤੇ ਬਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਗਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: baasudev niranjan daate baran na saakau gun angaa |5|
lines.english: O Lord, Immacuate Great Giver, I cannot describe even an iota of Your Glorious Virtues. ||5||
The Lord and Master of the milk-maids, You are the companion of all.
You are the Lover of Your devotees, the Master of the masterless.
Savior of Dropadi's honor.
Liberator, Enticing Lord, Lord of Lakshmi, Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲਾਕੰਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਕੰਤੂਹਲ ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦੀ ਨਿਹਸੰਗਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kamalaakant kareh kantoohal anad binodee nihasangaa |6|
lines.english: Lord of Maya, miracle-worker, absorbed in delightful play, unattached. ||6||
The Blessed Vision of His Darshan is fruitful and rewarding; He is not born, He is self-existent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਦੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਉ ॥
lines.translit: akaal moorat jis kade naahee khau |
lines.english: His form is undying; it is never destroyed.
The Lover of greatness, who dwells in heaven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਬਿਗਤ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਹੈ ਲਗਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: abinaasee abigat agochar sabh kichh tujh hee hai lagaa |7|
lines.english: O imperishable, eternal, unfathomable Lord, everything is attached to You. ||7||
By the Pleasure of His Will, He took incarnation as the great fish and the tortoise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਸਵ ਚਲਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੇ ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜਹਿ ਸੋ ਹੋਇਗਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: kesav chalat kareh niraale keetaa lorreh so hoeigaa |8|
lines.english: The Lord of beauteous hair, the Worker of miraculous deeds, whatever He wishes, comes to pass. ||8||
He has staged His play; He is called the four-armed Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਲ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਰੂਪ ਬਣਾਵਹਿ ਬੇਣੁ ਸੁਨਤ ਸਭ ਮੋਹੈਗਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: saaval sundar roop banaaveh ben sunat sabh mohaigaa |9|
lines.english: He assumed the beautiful form of the blue-skinned Krishna; hearing His flute, all are fascinated and enticed. ||9||
He is beyond need of any sustenance, free of hate and all-pervading.
He is adorned with garlands of flowers, with lotus eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਖ ਚਕ੍ਰ ਗਦਾ ਹੈ ਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਾ ਸਾਰਥੀ ਸਤਸੰਗਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sankh chakr gadaa hai dhaaree mahaa saarathee satasangaa |10|
lines.english: He carries the conch, the chakra and the war club; He is the Great Charioteer, who stays with His Saints. ||10||
His ear-rings, crown and flute are so beautiful.
The Lord of the Universe, the Lord of the world; with my mouth, I chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਿੰਗਧਰ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਬੀਠੁਲਾ ਮੈ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਸਰਬੰਗਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: saaringadhar bhagavaan beetthulaa mai ganat na aavai sarabangaa |11|
lines.english: The Archer who draws the bow, the Beloved Lord God; I cannot count all His limbs. ||11||
The Lord of yellow robes, the Master of the three worlds.
The Lord of prosperity, pervading the water, the land and the sky.
He is said to be free of anguish, and absolutely immaculate.
